case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. K CLOUD et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-20-2008 CONTINUED TO SEP-19-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
